landing.badge: Now in GA — SaaSmint 2.0 with AI Agents
landing.headline: The platform teams actually <accent>ship with</accent>
landing.subheadline: Stop managing infrastructure. Start shipping product. SaaSmint handles deploys, scaling, and observability so your team can focus on what matters.
landing.featuresTitle: Built for teams that care about quality
landing.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to deploy confidently at any scale — without the ops overhead.
landing.featureDeploysDesc: Push to Git, live in 30 seconds. Zero config, just connect your repository and go.
landing.featureAiDesc: Autonomous agents handle testing, monitoring, and incident response on your behalf.
landing.featureEdgeDesc: Deploy to 60+ regions simultaneously. Sub-20ms responses for users anywhere.
landing.featureObsDesc: Metrics, logs, and traces in one place. ML-powered alerting catches issues first.
landing.featureSecDesc: End-to-end encryption, RBAC, secret management, and SSO included by default.
landing.featureIntDesc: GitHub, Slack, Datadog, PagerDuty and hundreds more — plug in your existing stack.
landing.ctaSectionSubtitle: Join 12,400+ engineering teams. Free forever, no card required.

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete your account and all data.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.description: Have a question or need help? We'd love to hear from you.

about.title: About this project
about.intro: This is an open-source SaaS starter built with Next.js and Stripe. It gives you authentication, billing, organisations, and i18n out of the box — so you can skip the boilerplate and start building your product.
about.body: Fork it on GitHub, swap in your own branding, and you're ready to go. Whether you're launching a side project or a full-blown SaaS, this template has you covered.
about.repoFrontend: Next.js frontend with auth, billing, and i18n
about.repoBackend: Django backend with Stripe integration and REST API

blog.title: Blog
blog.comingSoon: New posts coming soon. Stay tuned!

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using SaaSmint, you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully before using our services.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: We use cookies to improve your experience. This policy explains how and why we use cookies on our website.
